visual_summary: A button with a ripple effect, triggered by click. Used for interactive buttons. Can be configured with a custom ripple color.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: Ripple Button Demo
Description: A button with a ripple effect, triggered by click. Used for interactive buttons. Can be configured with a custom ripple color.
Style: default, customizable
Interactions: animated, clickable
Tags: button, interactive, clickable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { RippleButton } from "@/registry/magicui/ripple-button"

export default function RippleButtonDemo() {
  return <RippleButton rippleColor="#ADD8E6">Click me</RippleButton>
}
